title: CanonicalArtifact
description: The canonical schema for a normalized Egyptian artifact record. All fields are optional except id, source_museum, and source_url. Both the pipeline (Pydantic) and web app (Drizzle) derive their types from this file.

source_id.description: The object's ID in the source museum's system

source_url.description: Permalink to the object on the source museum's website

title.description: Primary title or name of the artifact

dimensions.description: Dimensions as provided by the museum (free text, not normalized)

period.description: Egyptological period (e.g., 'New Kingdom', 'Late Period'). Normalized via authority list.

ruler_id.description: Canonical ruler identifier from the authority list (e.g., 'thutmose-iii')

ruler_display_name.description: Display name for the ruler (e.g., 'Thutmose III'). Resolved from authority list.

date_start.description: Earliest estimated date (negative for BCE, e.g., -1479)

date_end.description: Latest estimated date (negative for BCE, e.g., -1425)

date_display.description: Human-readable date string as provided by museum (e.g., 'ca. 1479-1425 B.C.')

origin_site_id.description: Canonical site identifier from the site hierarchy (e.g., 'karnak')

origin_site_display_name.description: Display name for the origin site (e.g., 'Temple of Karnak'). Resolved from site hierarchy.

origin_site_raw.description: Raw provenance/origin text as provided by the museum, before normalization

origin_certainty.description: Confidence in the origin attribution. Derived from museum language ('From', 'Possibly from', 'Said to be from').

excavation_id.description: Excavation or find context identifier, if available (enables Tier A companion matching)

tomb_temple_id.description: Tomb or temple identifier (e.g., 'KV34', 'TT100'), if available (enables Tier A companion matching)

current_location.description: Current gallery or location within the museum (e.g., 'Gallery 115')

credit_line.description: Museum credit line or acquisition information

image_url.description: URL to the primary image. MUST check license field before rendering.

thumbnail_url.description: URL to a thumbnail image. MUST check license field before rendering.

license.description: License governing image display. Determines rendering behavior: embed, thumbnail-only, or link-out.

wikidata_id.description: Wikidata Q-identifier for this artifact, if matched (e.g., 'Q60682')
